description: Detects high volumes of failed authentication attempts from a single IP address targeting one or more user accounts, indicating possible brute force or password spraying activity.
query: SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated >= ago(30m) | where ResultType != 0 | summarize FailedAttempts=count(), TargetedAccounts=dcount(UserPrincipalName), Accounts=make_set(UserPrincipalName,20) by IPAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m) | where FailedAttempts >= 20 or TargetedAccounts >= 5
